Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Strike, Strike Long Range, and Strike Precision are typically intended for use against ground targets (land installations).
Strike loadouts will contain dumb bombs and cluster bombs. Strike Precision loadouts will carry either laser-guided bombs or TV guided bombs, both of which have special requirements for employment.

require a clear view of the target for the designating aircraft to paint with the laser. Note that aircraft can 'buddy laze' for each other using the 'Laser Designator' weapon type on a specific track!
require a clear view of the target (e.g., no cloud cover obstructing) for the TV seeker to see the target. Typically glide bombs, they should be dropped from high altitude to maximize standoff range.
